case_title: BROWN BENJAMIN JERREL VS KIM RICHARD et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KIM RICHARD LUCKY CENTER USED CAR DEALER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN BENJAMIN JERREL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KIM RICHARD LUCKY CENTER USED CAR DEALER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
